name: Ana
text: Oh... a new face. Haven't seen one of those in a while.

name: You
text: I'm here to help. I'll be staying with you for a while.

name: Ana
text: Staying... yes. Good. The house has been quiet.

name: Ana
text: Look at the walls when you walk around. Really look.

name: Ana
text: You'll know when you see it.

name: Ana
text: There's a coin somewhere... near the well... someone buried it there a long time ago.

name: Ana
text: I'd like to hold it again. If you find it.
